action.reasoning: Observation: the all-17 uniform soup underperformed (0.7730) compared with the known best 9-member ConvNeXt uniform weight soup (0.7776). Analysis: the greedy soup also selected exactly the 9-member soup, and all other attempts (logit/prob ensembles, calibration, extra seeds, CLIP/ResNet diversity, shift TTA) were worse. Decision: final submission should revert to the best validated checkpoint checkpoints/convnext_soup9_uniform.pt with the existing predict.py.
